title: Hello's Big Balls
description: Adds different types of Balls that give the player special effects!
body:
Hello's Big Balls is a PvP mod made for SMPs!

This mod can give users an enchanced experience when playing Minecraft PvP, as it can add all kinds of new kits and strategies!

- Starter ball gives Strength 1
- Herobrine ball gives Strength 2
- Haste Balls 1-5 give Haste, except the Haste Ball 5 gives Haste 8 (so you can insta-mine deepslate)
- Resistance balls 1-3 give resistance (though levels 2 and 3 have a catch)
- Speed balls 1-5 give Speed
- Strength ball gives Strength 3, and right clicking on a player/mob with it gives it Weakness 2
- Light ball gives strength 2, resistance 2, speed 3, haste 3
- Night ball gives strength 2, resistance 1, speed 2, haste 2, except it has an ability.
  right clicking on a mob/player will give it slowness 3 weakness 3
  using it normally gives you strength 5 resistance 3

Recipes can be unlocked through in-game progression, or can be found in the discord server in the #recipes channel! (click on the issue tracker link)

Players also drop their heads when killed by another player!

Please ask me any questions about the mod in my discord server/DM!

Please report any bugs/suggestions to my discord server in #general and make sure to ping me!

Thanks to Kaupenjoe for the tutorials!
